build.beforeBuildCommand: mv app/api /tmp/api-bak && mv app/manifest.ts /tmp/manifest-bak && mv app/movie /tmp/movie-bak && mv app/tv/[...slug] /tmp/tv-slug-bak && mv app/person/[...slug] /tmp/person-slug-bak && TAURI_ENV=true npm run build ; mv /tmp/api-bak app/api ; mv /tmp/manifest-bak app/manifest.ts ; mv /tmp/movie-bak app/movie ; mv /tmp/tv-slug-bak app/tv/[...slug] ; mv /tmp/person-slug-bak app/person/[...slug]
